text:
うわ！
またさっきのでっかい鳥！
こいつは厄介ね……

神様の力を少しだけ貸してあげる。
そいつらの相手は任せたわよ！
マルガレータから譲り受けた神威でエネミーを倒せ！

Whoa! There are those huge birds from before!
These things are annoying...

I'll lend you just a little of the gods' power.
Now it's up to you to take care of them all!

Defeat the enemies using the power of the gods
granted to you by Margareta!
